feedback.text: In the current state I worry that there is no gurantee, that the games I digitally or physically bought, will be there any time as a product I brought. The Crew is one of those game that become the victim of this, and I have several childhood favorites that I only have digitally, and I fear the publishers will take it away one day that I legally own. I would like that something I own, even digitally I will still own it.
